style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An editorial cover illustration on warm cream paper, deep Alberta navy line work with small rust accents. A clean rounded enclosure, like a glass-walled control room, containing several small workstations each with a glowing screen and a tiny robot token at work. Above them, a single calm eye motif rendered in simple line work, watching. The enclosure sits within a larger rounded cloud boundary, sealed and observed. Wide cover aspect, calm and archival. No text, no logos, no people.
